# BDE Score — MCP Server

> AI-powered multi-market stock analysis MCP server. 6 MCP tools for scoring, comparison, screening, sector analysis, and ESG. Covers 73 stocks across US, HK, and A-share markets with 7-factor transparent scoring. EU AI Act Art.50 compliant.

## MCP Server

Connect BDE Score as an MCP tool for Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP client:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "bde-score": {
      "url": "https://fantasy-bald-shark-stereo.trycloudflare.com/mcp",
      "headers": {
        "X-API-Key": "YOUR_API_KEY"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

Transport: Streamable HTTP (MCP protocol)

## MCP Tools

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `get_bde_score` | Get BDE composite scores (0-100) for all stocks in a market (US/HK/CN/ALL) |
| `get_stock_analysis` | Detailed single-stock analysis with 7-factor breakdown |
| `get_multi_market_comparison` | Compare same company across US/HK/CN markets |
| `get_stock_screener` | Screen stocks by minimum BDE score threshold |
| `get_sector_analysis` | Sector-level aggregation and rankings |
| `get_esg_analysis` | ESG analysis per stock with compliance metadata |

## 7-Factor Model

Each stock receives a composite score (0-100):
- **VIX Regime** — Market fear gauge overlay
- **Volume Profile** — Institutional accumulation/distribution
- **RSI** (14-period) — Momentum and mean reversion
- **MACD** — Trend direction and momentum shifts
- **Bollinger Bands** — Volatility regime
- **OBV** — Volume-confirmed trend strength
- **ATR** — Risk-normalized volatility

Signal: Bullish (>70), Neutral (40-70), Bearish (<40).

## Coverage

- **US** (25): AAPL, MSFT, GOOG, AMZN, META, NVDA, AMD, AVGO, ARM, INTC, V, MA, JNJ, UNH, LLY, PFE, PG, KO, WMT, MCD, TSLA, NFLX, BABA, SPY, QQQ
- **HK** (26): 00700, 09988, 09888, 03690, 01024, 01810, 09618, 09999, 02015, 09868, 01211, 09863, 02318, 01398, 00939, 03988, 02628, 02899, 00883, 00857, 01088, 00941, 00728, 00762, 01833, 02269
- **A-Share** (23): SH600519, SZ000858, SZ000568, SH600887, SZ002714, SH601318, SH600036, SH601398, SH601288, SZ300750, SH601012, SZ002594, SH600900, SH688981, SZ002475, SZ002230, SH603501, SH601899, SH601088, SH600585, SZ000333, SH600690, SZ000651
